basic_details.job_title: Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 343 Anganwadi Teacher & Helper Posts in Nalgonda District
basic_details.organization_name: District Welfare Officer, Women, Child Disabled & Senior Citizens Department, Nalgonda
basic_details.short_information: The Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Helper Recruitment 2026 is a direct recruitment drive conducted under the Telangana government's Women and Child Development department. The notification was published on 24 June 2026 and covers vacancies at Anganwadi Centres (AWCs) across multiple ICDS projects in Nalgonda district.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Bharti 2026. Candidates can apply online at wdcw.tg.nic.in without any fee payment.

age_limit.details: Candidates wondering about the age limit for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Bharti 2026 should note that the minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years . The age will be calculated as on the date of notification. The official notification specifies that candidates between 18 and 35 years of age are eligible; no candidate outside this range will be considered. | Post Minimum Age Maximum Age Anganwadi Worker (AWT) 18 years 35 years Anganwadi Helper (AWH) 18 years 35 years

qualification.details: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. Candidates must be permanent residents of the gram panchayat or ward (in urban areas) where the Anganwadi Centre vacancy exists. Both the Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts have specific educational qualification and age requirements as set out in the official notification. | For the Anganwadi Worker post, the merit list will be prepared on the basis of the highest educational qualification. Candidates with higher qualifications will be ranked above those with only Intermediate. For both posts, the candidate must belong to the same gram panchayat or ward (in urban/Samsthana areas) as the concerned AWC. | Candidates wondering about the age limit for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Bharti 2026 should note that the minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years. The age will be calculated as on the date of notification. The official notification specifies that candidates between 18 and 35 years of age are eligible; no candidate outside this range will be considered. | For the Anganwadi Worker post in rural areas, the candidate must be a local woman from that specific gram panchayat area. For urban/Samsthana areas, she must be from the same ward. For the Anganwadi Helper post, the candidate must specifically be a woman from the same gram panchayat or ward area (gram panchayat/ward samstha perimitlo) as the AWC. The residential requirement is strictly enforced for both posts. | The notification specifies a defined priority order for selection under the Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Vacancy 2026: | Local women from the same gram sabha/ward (gram panchayat/ward area) who belong to BPL families - widows, legally divorced, or abandoned women - given first priority. If no such candidates are available from the above category, other women from BPL families of the same gram panchayat/ward area are given priority. If the above categories are exhausted, women from APL families (above poverty line) of the same gram panchayat/ward area - widows, divorced, or abandoned - are considered. If no candidates from the above categories are available, other women from APL families of the same gram panchayat/ward area are considered.

selection_process: There is no written examination for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. Selection is based on a merit-cum-priority system as defined by the Telangana government. The selection committee (Zilla Anganwadi Emarpu Committee
Nalgonda) will prepare the merit list based on marks obtained in the qualifying examination and the priority categories defined in the notification.

The selection committee will finalize the selection. Applications submitted only through the online portal wdcw.tg.nic.in will be considered. Applications submitted in any other mode will not be accepted. The final selected candidates' lists will be displayed at the Collectorate/Vikas Bhavan
Nalgonda and at the CDPO/DWO office.
how_to_apply: Eligible female candidates can apply for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Helper Recruitment 2026 exclusively through the online portal at wdcw.tg.nic.in. The application window is open from 27 June 2026 to 10 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. No offline or paper applications will be accepted under any circumstances for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Bharti 2026.
Visit the official Telangana WDC portal at wdcw.tg.nic.in.
Navigate to the Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 application link.
Identify the AWC (Anganwadi Centre) in your gram panchayat/ward from the published vacancy list.
Fill in the online application form with your personal, educational, and residential details.
Upload required documents including proof of residence, educational certificates, age proof, and caste certificate (if applicable).
Submit the application online before 10 July 2026 by 5:00 PM.
Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

Candidates must note that income certificates, caste certificates, and residence certificates must be issued by the competent authority (tehsil-level authority with digital signature verifiable online). For widow status, a death certificate of the husband issued by the gram panchayat/urban body and an authenticated family register copy must be submitted. For divorced/abandoned status, a court-issued legal order must be furnished.

content_sections.heading: Nalgonda Anganwadi Notification 2026 – PDF Download Link
content_sections.text: The official Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 notification (G.O. No. 725/A/2026 dated 19.06.2026) issued by the District Welfare Officer, Women, Child Disabled & Senior Citizens Department, Nalgonda is available for download at the official Telangana WDC portal. The detailed AWC-wise vacancy list in the AWT/AWH Vacancy Format of DWO, Nalgonda District is also published alongside the notification. Candidates should download and carefully read the vacancy list to identify their eligible AWC before applying for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Helper Bharti 2026.

content_sections.heading: Nalgonda Anganwadi Bharti 2026 – Overview
content_sections.text: The Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Helper Recruitment 2026 is a direct recruitment drive conducted under the Telangana government's Women and Child Development department. The notification was published on 24 June 2026 and covers vacancies at Anganwadi Centres (AWCs) across multiple ICDS projects in Nalgonda district.

rows.information: District Welfare Officer, Women, Child Disabled & Senior Citizens Department, Nalgonda

content_sections.heading: Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 – Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Vacancy 2026 must be aware of the key dates to avoid missing the window. The online application portal opens on 27 June 2026 and the last date to submit the application online is 10 July 2026 by 5:00 PM . No offline applications will be accepted; applications must be submitted only through the official website wdcw.tg.nic.in.

content_sections.heading: Nalgonda Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 – Project-wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The Nalgonda Anganwadi Karyakatri Sahayika Bharti 2026 covers vacancies across 9 ICDS projects in Nalgonda district - Anumula, Chinthapally, Damaracherla, Deverakonda, Kondamallepally, Miryalaguda (U), Munugodu, Nakrekal, and Nalgonda. The vacancy list runs to 343 entries covering both AWT (Anganwadi Worker) and AWH (Anganwadi Helper) positions at specific Anganwadi Centres identified by AWC ID and AWC name. Candidates must apply only for the AWC in the gram panchayat or ward where they are permanent residents. The AWH (Anganwadi Helper) vacancies across the list are primarily reserved for the ST (Scheduled Tribe) category as indicated in the vacancy format column for AWH positions. The AWT (Anganwadi Worker) positions carry category-wise reservations including SC Group-I, SC Group-II, SC Group-III, OBC, BC-A, BC-B, BC-C, BC-D, BC-E, ST, VH, EWS, and Ex-SOC categories as specified against each AWC in the district vacancy list. The complete AWC-wise vacancy list with AWC ID, AWC Name, AWT/AWH vacancy status, category reservation, and From/To dates (27.06.2026 to 10.07.2026) is available on the official portal wdcw.tg.nic.in. Candidates should refer to the full vacancy list to identify the specific AWC for which they are eligible to apply.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria – Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Helper Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. Candidates must be permanent residents of the gram panchayat or ward (in urban areas) where the Anganwadi Centre vacancy exists. Both the Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts have specific educational qualification and age requirements as set out in the official notification. For the Anganwadi Worker post, the merit list will be prepared on the basis of the highest educational qualification . Candidates with higher qualifications will be ranked above those with only Intermediate. For both posts, the candidate must belong to the same gram panchayat or ward (in urban/Samsthana areas) as the concerned AWC. Candidates wondering about the age limit for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Bharti 2026 should note that the minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years . The age will be calculated as on the date of notification. The official notification specifies that candidates between 18 and 35 years of age are eligible; no candidate outside this range will be considered. For the Anganwadi Worker post in rural areas, the candidate must be a local woman from that specific gram panchayat area. For urban/Samsthana areas, she must be from the same ward. For the Anganwadi Helper post, the candidate must specifically be a woman from the same gram panchayat or ward area (gram panchayat/ward samstha perimitlo) as the AWC. The residential requirement is strictly enforced for both posts. The notification specifies a defined priority order for selection under the Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Vacancy 2026: Local women from the same gram sabha/ward (gram panchayat/ward area) who belong to BPL families - widows, legally divorced, or abandoned women - given first priority. If no such candidates are available from the above category, other women from BPL families of the same gram panchayat/ward area are given priority. If the above categories are exhausted, women from APL families (above poverty line) of the same gram panchayat/ward area - widows, divorced, or abandoned - are considered. If no candidates from the above categories are available, other women from APL families of the same gram panchayat/ward area are considered.

rows.minimum_qualification: Intermediate ( 10 +2 ) or equivalent. Merit is prepared on the basis of maximum educational qualification.
Literate (ability to read and write). Candidates from the same gram panchayat/ward area.

tables.caption: minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years

content_sections.heading: Application Fee – Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Bharti 2026. Candidates can apply online at wdcw.tg.nic.in without any fee payment.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process – Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Helper Vacancy 2026
content_sections.text: There is no written examination for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. Selection is based on a merit-cum-priority system as defined by the Telangana government. The selection committee (Zilla Anganwadi Emarpu Committee, Nalgonda) will prepare the merit list based on marks obtained in the qualifying examination and the priority categories defined in the notification. The selection committee will finalize the selection. Applications submitted only through the online portal wdcw.tg.nic.in will be considered. Applications submitted in any other mode will not be accepted. The final selected candidates' lists will be displayed at the Collectorate/Vikas Bhavan, Nalgonda and at the CDPO/DWO office.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
content_sections.text: Eligible female candidates can apply for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Helper Recruitment 2026 exclusively through the online portal at wdcw.tg.nic.in . The application window is open from 27 June 2026 to 10 July 2026 by 5:00 PM . No offline or paper applications will be accepted under any circumstances for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Bharti 2026. Visit the official Telangana WDC portal at wdcw.tg.nic.in . Navigate to the Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 application link. Identify the AWC (Anganwadi Centre) in your gram panchayat/ward from the published vacancy list. Fill in the online application form with your personal, educational, and residential details. Upload required documents including proof of residence, educational certificates, age proof, and caste certificate (if applicable). Submit the application online before 10 July 2026 by 5:00 PM . Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference. Candidates must note that income certificates, caste certificates, and residence certificates must be issued by the competent authority (tehsil-level authority with digital signature verifiable online). For widow status, a death certificate of the husband issued by the gram panchayat/urban body and an authenticated family register copy must be submitted. For divorced/abandoned status, a court-issued legal order must be furnished.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid in Nalgonda Anganwadi Bharti 2026
content_sections.text: Many candidates make avoidable errors while applying for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Helper Vacancy 2026 that result in rejection. The following points are based on common patterns in similar state government anganwadi recruitment drives and are not derived from the official notification. Applying for an AWC outside your residential area: Each vacancy is tied to a specific AWC in a specific gram panchayat/ward. Applying for an AWC outside your permanent residential area is a direct disqualification. Submitting application offline or via post: Applications are accepted only online through wdcw.tg.nic.in. Paper applications, hand-delivered applications, or those submitted via email will not be considered. Missing the 5:00 PM deadline on 10 July 2026: The portal closes at 5:00 PM on 10 July 2026, not midnight. Many candidates assume an end-of-day deadline and miss the window. Not verifying the AWC vacancy status before applying: Not every AWC has both AWT and AWH vacancies. Candidates must check the AWC-specific vacancy list to confirm whether the AWC they are applying for has an open position in the post they want. Uploading unverifiable certificates: Caste, income, and residence certificates must be digitally signed by the competent tehsil authority and must be verifiable online. Manually signed certificates will be rejected. Incorrect widow/divorce documentation: Widows must provide the husband's death certificate from the gram panchayat/urban body AND a family register copy. Informal separation documents are not valid for abandoned/divorced status. Applying without checking the priority category: If the AWC vacancy is reserved for a specific category (ST, SC Group-I, BC-A, etc.), only candidates belonging to that category are eligible to apply for that specific AWC position.

faq.question: Q1. Has the Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 official notification been released?
faq.answer: Yes, the District Welfare Officer, Women, Child Disabled & Senior Citizens Department, Nalgonda has officially released the Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 notification vide G.O. No. 725/A/2026 dated 19.06.2026. The public press notification was published on 24 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Nalgonda Anganwadi Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Helper Recruitment 2026 is 10 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Applications must be submitted through the official portal wdcw.tg.nic.in only.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official AWC-wise vacancy list for Nalgonda district covers 343 entries for both Anganwadi Worker (AWT) and Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts across 9 ICDS projects — Anumula, Chinthapally, Damaracherla, Deverakonda, Kondamallepally, Miryalaguda (U), Munugodu, Nakrekal, and Nalgonda. Each vacancy is specific to a particular AWC.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: Only female candidates aged 18 to 35 years who are permanent residents of the concerned gram panchayat or ward are eligible. For the AWT post, the minimum qualification is Intermediate (12th pass). For the AWH post, candidates must be literate. Males are not eligible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years as on the notification date. No age relaxation details beyond this range are mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for Nalgonda Anganwadi Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026. The application at wdcw.tg.nic.in is free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. Is there a written test for Nalgonda Anganwadi Worker Helper Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No written examination is mentioned in the official notification. Selection is based on a merit-cum-priority system that considers educational qualification marks, a local test, interview, and Zilla Emarpu Committee evaluation. Priority is given to BPL widows, divorced, and abandoned women from the same gram panchayat/ward.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I apply online for Nalgonda Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications can be submitted only through the official Telangana WDC portal at wdcw.tg.nic.in. No offline, postal, or email applications will be accepted. The portal is open from 27 June 2026 to 10 July 2026 (5:00 PM).

faq.question: Q9. Can I apply for any AWC in Nalgonda district or only for my gram panchayat?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply only for the AWC located in their own gram panchayat or ward where they are a permanent resident. Applying for an AWC outside the candidate's residential area makes her ineligible for that post.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the selected candidates' list be displayed for Nalgonda Anganwadi Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The final selected candidates' list will be displayed at the Collectorate/Vikas Bhavan, Nalgonda and at the respective CDPO/DWO office. Candidates are advised to also monitor the official website wdcw.tg.nic.in for updates.
